worstLists.name: Boston Fern
worstLists.lastReason: Takes part shade to full shade and moderate to high water; evergreen, so the bed keeps its shape through winter; they only overlap in zone 9.

worstLists.name: Alocasia Polly
worstLists.lastReason: Takes full sun to part sun and moderate to high water; its seed heads stand through winter, for structure and the birds; taller at 1.5 m, for the layer behind it; they only overlap in zone 9.

worstLists.name: Halcyon
worstLists.lastReason: Takes part shade to full shade and moderate water; evergreen, so the bed keeps its shape through winter.

worstLists.name: Boston Ivy
worstLists.lastReason: Takes full sun to part sun and moderate water.

worstLists.name: Fenway Park
worstLists.lastReason: Takes full sun to part sun and moderate water.

worstLists.name: Berry Smoothie
worstLists.lastReason: Shares part shade and moderate water; taller at 1.2 m, for the layer behind it.

worstLists.lastReason: Takes part shade to full shade and moderate water; taller at 1.2 m, for the layer behind it.

worstLists.lastReason: Takes part sun to part shade and high water; lower at 0.5 m, for the front of the border.
